response.justification: Bogdan possesses over two decades of extensive software engineering experience, easily meeting the 15-year minimum requirement, alongside valuable entrepreneurial experience as a founder. While he demonstrates strong technical craftsmanship and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, his resume lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML strategic expertise and Director-level leadership typically expected for this Principal AI Strategy role. He is a strong technical candidate, but his fit for a specialized AI strategy position is borderline.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with over 20 years in software engineering.
Demonstrates preferred entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Proven track record of inspiring others through workshops, open-source contributions, and technical talks.
concerns: Lacks a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification.
AI experience appears limited to recent tooling rather than deep, recognized strategic AI expertise.
Current and past roles (Senior/Staff) may not fully align with the Director-level strategic responsibilities required.
